TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjuavanaq, title = Tjuavanaq, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjuavanaq} }

S.FORM: alang Tjuavanaq ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 39 buwan, 89 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 88 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 98%, Puyuma 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjuavanaq hya' ga Tjuaqau. tay 'zil na Tjuavanaq hya' ga Tjuamanges. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuavanaq ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjuavanaq ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Taznin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 39 buwan, 89 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 88 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 98%, Puyuma 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tjuavanaq hya' ga Tjuaqau. tay 'zil na Tjuavanaq hya' ga Tjuamanges. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Tjuavanaq ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjua*anaq ɣa nija mki s~ɕku tajto keŋ atu taznin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, pujuma *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tjua*anaq ħjaʔ ɣa tjuaqau. taj ʔzil na tjua*anaq ħjaʔ ɣa tjuamaŋes~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ tjua*anaq ɣa uŋat kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
